steps.title: Supply a finite verb
steps.content: The sentence has the subject "Sarah McAnulty" but still needs a finite main verb to form a complete independent clause.

steps.title: Reject verbals
steps.content: A is a participle, and C and D are infinitive phrases; none can be the main verb by itself. "Was working" is a finite past-tense verb that completes the sentence with the singular subject. The answer is B.
